message.content:
@startuml
' Define styles
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Black
  ArrowColor Black
  FontColor Black
}
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFE0
  BorderColor #999999
  FontColor Black
}
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor #E0E0FF
  BorderColor #6666CC
  FontColor Black
}

' Define classes
class "Invoker" {
  <<Interface>>
}
class "Command" {
  <<Interface>>
  execute()
  undo()
}
class "ConcreteCommand" {
  <<Class>>
  execute()
  undo()
}
class "Client" {
  <<Interface>>
}
class "Receiver" {
  <<Interface>>
  action()
}

' Define relationships
Invoker --> Command : implements
Command <|.. ConcreteCommand : extends
Client --> ConcreteCommand : creates
Client --> Receiver : uses
ConcreteCommand --> Receiver : uses

' Define notes
note left of Invoker
  调用者持有命令对象，
  并在某刻调用execute()
end note

note right of Command
  调用命令对象的execute()
  就可以让接收者进行动作
end note

note right of Client
  这个客户负责创建一个
  ConcreteCommand，并
  设置其接受者
end note

note left of ConcreteCommand
  定义了动作和接收者之间
  的绑定关系，调用者只需要
  调用execute()就可以
  发出请求
end note

note right of Receiver
  接收者知道如何实现这个请求
end note

@enduml
